abbreviations.definition: repeat the sequence of loops in brackets L times

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work 10 single crochets into it.

rounds.title: Row 2
rounds.summary: Increase in every stitch around, six times.

rounds.title: Row 3
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.

rounds.title: Row 4
rounds.summary: Work five single crochets then an increase, repeated twice.

rounds.title: Rows 5-6
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for two rows.

rounds.title: Row 7
rounds.rawInstruction: inc, 5 sc, 3 inc, 3 sc, 2 inc = 20 sc
rounds.summary: Increase, five single crochets, three increases, three single crochets, two increases.

rounds.title: Row 8
rounds.summary: Three increases, five single crochets, three increases, nine single crochets.

rounds.title: Rows 9-15
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for seven rows.

rounds.title: Row 16
rounds.summary: Two decreases, ten single crochets, two decreases, eight single crochets.

rounds.title: Stuff
rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the head section.

rounds.title: Row 17
rounds.rawInstruction: (4 sc, dec) х 3 times, 4 sc = 19 sc
rounds.summary: Repeat four single crochets then a decrease three times, then four single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 18
rounds.rawInstruction: (2 sc, dec) х 4 times, 3 sc = 15 sc
rounds.summary: Repeat two single crochets then a decrease four times, then three single crochets.

rounds.title: Stuff
rounds.summary: Add more stuffing before continuing the body.

rounds.title: Rows 19-92
rounds.summary: Work 74 rows of 15 single crochet, gradually stuffing into the whole body.

rounds.title: Row 93
rounds.summary: Decrease then thirteen single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 94
rounds.summary: Decrease then twelve single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 95
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.

rounds.title: Row 96
rounds.summary: Decrease then eleven single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 97
rounds.summary: Decrease then ten single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 98
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.

rounds.title: Row 99
rounds.summary: Decrease then nine single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 100
rounds.summary: Decrease then eight single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 101
rounds.summary: Repeat one single crochet then a decrease three times.

rounds.title: Row 102
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.

rounds.title: Close 6 loops
rounds.summary: Close the remaining six loops to finish the tail.

rounds.title: Gluing the eyes
rounds.rawInstruction: I smeared the tips of the eyes with glue and inserted them in 10 rows from the beginning of the head, the distance between the eyes is 10 loops.
rounds.summary: Glue the eyes 10 rows from the head start, spaced 10 loops apart.

rounds.title: Embroider eyebrows
rounds.rawInstruction: We embroider eyebrows over the eyes
rounds.summary: Embroider eyebrows above the glued eyes.

materials: YarnArt Dolce Baby (100% Micro Polyester), Color No.: 80361
